title: Lando Lonestar's Modpack
description:
Lando Lonestar's Modpack is a pack with all the mods, resource packs, and shaders that Lando uses for his livestreams and videos. 

Custom settings for shaders and mods carry over so be sure to change the settings to your own liking.
body:
Extreamly Vanilla+/Vanilla friendly Modpack. Only changes the game visually and helps with optimization.

Lando Lonestar's Modpack is a pack with all the mods, resource packs, and shaders that Lando uses for his livestreams and videos. 

Custom settings for shaders and mods carry over so be sure to change the settings to your own liking.

Other Mods/Recource packs found outside of Modrinth:

[https://vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net)

[https://www.mcpaintings.com](https://www.mcpaintings.com)
